content:
## Scope: CodeHealth Is Not Part of This System

CodeHealth is a separate project. It is mainly for signalling when refactoring is necessary. It was incorrectly referenced in early wiki drafts as part of the pipeline and was explicitly removed. The pipeline ends at characterisation tests, not CodeHealth. [[source:811302f6-0be7-435c-b844-910cc9a21b67/17]]

provenance.raw_agent: All clear. CodeHealth is removed from the wiki — the pipeline now ends at characterisation tests, and the traceability chain reflects that.
provenance.raw_user: I don't think codehealth is being correctly referred to in the wiki. It is a project, but it's mainly for signalling when refactoring is necessary. Can you edit that out
